channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: preparation part
item.description: The process of making a Voron 0.2 Buying parts on the internet I went on the official website of Voron and selected the Voron 0.2. Click “configurator” and you get the BOM list of the parts you need to buy. BOM link Preparing for and printing the printed parts After buying all of the parts needed, I started to typeset the printed parts according to the manual. I used BambuStudio as my slicing software and printed on Bambu Lab P1S and X1C printers.
